questionHtml: Global ecosystem modelling suggests that most of the change in LAI is due to increases in atmospheric carbon dioxide. Explain how rising atmospheric carbon dioxide (CO2) concentration could cause the observed change in LAI.
markschemeHtml:
1. more photosynthesis (with higher carbon dioxide concentration);
  2. more plant growth/more (plant) biomass/more leaves/more plants;

If the answer focuses on greenhouse effect or global warming, do not award mpa, but mpb can be awarded if one of the alternatives is included in the answer.
